data.title: Write integration verification test for prior-art search fragment consumer references
data.description:
RED test: verify that the 3 consuming skills reference prior-art-search.md at the correct decision points.

File: tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh

Add .test-index RED marker: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh [test_fix_bug_references_prior_art]

test_fix_bug_references_prior_art MUST be the first test function.

Use extract_section helper (same as test-prior-art-search-structure.sh) for proximity-aware assertions.

Test assertions (4 tests):
1. test_fix_bug_references_prior_art: Extract Step 6 section from fix-bug/SKILL.md (between 'Step 6' and 'Step 7' headers), verify 'prior-art-search' appears within it. Proximity check — not whole file.
2. test_review_fix_dispatch_references_prior_art: review-fix-dispatch.md contains 'prior-art-search'
3. test_task_execution_references_prior_art: sprint/prompts/task-execution.md contains 'prior-art-search'
4. test_is_executable: test file is executable

File Impact:
- tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh (create)
- .test-index (edit — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test gate exits 0 with RED-marked failures tolerated - Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] RED state confirmed - Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and executable - Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh
- [ ] At least 4 test functions - Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-consumers.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present - Verify: grep -q 'fix-bug/SKILL.md.*test-prior-art-search-consumers.*\[test_fix_bug_references_prior_art\]' .test-index
